arts.ttl: Papers: PL clubs complain to PGMOL over Arsenal's use of 'dark arts'
arts.sum: The top stories and transfer rumours from Tuesday's newspapers...

arts.ttl: Rodri spotted heading to hospital consultation in Barcelona as Man City fear key midfielder has suffered season-ending injury against Arsenal
arts.sum: Manchester City midfielder Rodri has been spotted attending a specialist consultation at a hospital in Barcelona as the Premier League champions look for a diagnosis on his injury.

arts.ttl: Arsenal could play 16-year-old goalkeeper Jack Porter against Bolton with David Raya likely to be rested after picking up a knock at Man City and Pedro Neto cup tied
arts.sum: Arsenal could be forced to play 16-year-old rookie goalkeeper Jack Porter after David Raya limped off in Sunday's enthralling 2-2 draw against Manchester City.

arts.ttl: New footage obtained by Mail Sport appears to show Arsenal youngster Myles Lewis-Skelly sent to communicate with David Raya before keeper went down in time-wasting storm
arts.sum: EXCLUSIVE BY JACK GAUGHAN: Michael Oliver observed the 17-year-old communicating with Raya before the Arsenal goalkeeper fell to the floor and stopped proceedings.

arts.ttl: 'He gets compared to Jorginho': Man City expert names four academy stars who could play vs. Watford
arts.sum: Man City expert Steven McInerney from Esteemed Kompany tells Sports Mole which academy stars, including one compared to Jorginho, could play for Pep Guardiola's senior side in Tuesday's EFL Cup clash with Watford.

arts.ttl: Arsenal star Gabriel sends hostile warning to Erling Haaland and Man City team-mates
arts.sum: Arsenal claimed a share of the spoils at Manchester City on Sunday in a controversial and bad-tempered affair between the two Premier League title hopefuls

arts.ttl: Piers Morgan slams 'nasty' Man City star after incident with Arsenal teenager
arts.sum: Manchester City striker Erling Haaland was at the heart of things as his side battled back to secure a point against Arsenal and has since made headlines for his post-match mischief

arts.ttl: Ian Wright goes on X-rated Arsenal rant and tells Erling Haaland straight after Man City incidents
arts.sum: Despite mostly limiting the hosts to long-range strikes, Stones turned home a penalty box scramble in the final seconds, with Haaland celebrating by throwing the ball at the back of Gabriel's head. With the Trossard incident and pretty much everything Haaland did as the two huge talking points coming out of the game, Wright has delivered an honest verdict on both.

arts.ttl: REVEALED: What Leandro Trossard told Arsenal team-mates after being sent off in 2-2 draw with Man City
arts.sum: Leandro Trossard offered his Arsenal team-mates an explanation in the changing room after he was sent off against Manchester City on Sunday.

arts.ttl: Ian Wright calls Erling Haaland a ‘coward’ after Man City clash with Arsenal
arts.sum: John Stones’ injury-time equaliser sparked a series of confrontations at the end of an already-controversial encounter.
